violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine. Establishment is to send photo of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH. Establishment is has turned ice machine off and placed out of order during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
